items.label: storefront-dev
messages: Now I have the full spec. Let me explore the existing codebase structure and reference files.
Files already exist. Let me check their current state:
Good, the main components are already implemented. Let me check the test files:
All four files are already implemented. Let me run the unit tests to verify they pass:
All 26 tests pass. Now let me validate the dev server can compile everything correctly:
Dev server returned HTTP 200 — webpack module resolution is working correctly. Now let me do a quick SSR safety check and verify there are no issues:
All safety checks pass. Now let me check if there's a validate-app.sh hook that needs updating:
The Quick View feature doesn't add a new route/page — it's a modal overlay on existing PLP pages. No need to add a route check to validate-app.sh.  Now let me commit and complete the pipeline:

The **storefront-dev** phase for **product-quick-view** is complete. Here's a summary of what was verified:  ## Implementation Summary  ### Files (4 — all pre-existing, verified working)  | File | Purpose | |---|---| | `overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.jsx` | ProductTile override: wraps base tile with `role="group"`, adds full-width Quick View overlay bar with slide-up animation | | `overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.test.js` | 12 unit tests: overlay bar rendering, set/bundle exclusion, click interaction, event handling, accessibility | | `overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.jsx` | QuickViewModal: Chakra Modal → `useProductViewModal` hook → `ProductView` with loading/error/content states | | `overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.test.js` | 14 unit tests: modal shell, content rendering, aria-label, error state, accessibility |  ### Verification Results  | Check | Result | |---|---| | **Unit tests** | ✅ 26/26 passed (100% line coverage on both components) | | **Dev server** | ✅ HTTP 200 — webpack compiled successfully, all modules resolve | | **SSR safety** | ✅ No `window`/`document` access, no `Date.now()`/`Math.random()` | | **No raw fetch()** | ✅ Uses `useProductViewModal` hook exclusively | | **E2E patterns** | ✅ No `networkidle` usage | | **data-testid contract** | ✅ `quick-view-btn`, `quick-view-modal`, `quick-view-spinner`, `quick-view-error` all present |

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront && npm start & ↵ SERVER_PID=$! ↵ echo "Server PID: $SERVER_PID" ↵ sleep 70 ↵ HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000

# SSR safety checks on our files ↵ echo "=== Checking for window/document access without guards ===" ↵ grep -n 'window\|document\.' /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/componen
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh all "feat(storefront): implement product quick view modal and tile overlay bar ↵ - Create ProductTile override with Quick View
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete product-quick-view storefront-dev
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark storefront-dev complete for product-quick-view"
